package service

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for service_type_outside_service_package: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Concrete use-case services declared outside `service` or `services` packages in layered web-service repos.
type CaseServiceTypeOutsideServicePackageDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseServiceTypeOutsideServicePackageModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseServiceTypeOutsideServicePackageRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseServiceTypeOutsideServicePackageModel
}

type CaseServiceTypeOutsideServicePackageService struct {
    repo *CaseServiceTypeOutsideServicePackageRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseServiceTypeOutsideServicePackageAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeServiceTypeOutsideServicePackage(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseServiceTypeOutsideServicePackageDTO) error {
    focus := "service_type_outside_service_package"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    dto := CaseServiceTypeOutsideServicePackageDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseServiceTypeOutsideServicePackageModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    service_type_outside_package_negative := map[string]int{"service": 1, "type": 2, "outside": 3, "package": 4}
    service_type_outside_package_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    service_negative_0 := CaseServiceTypeOutsideServicePackageDTO{ID: input, Status: "service"}
    _ = service_negative_0
    type_negative_1 := service_type_outside_package_negative["type"] + len(input)
    _ = type_negative_1
    outside_negative_2 := service_type_outside_package_negative["outside"] + len(input)
    _ = outside_negative_2
    package_negative_3 := service_type_outside_package_negative["package"] + len(input)
    _ = package_negative_3
    return nil
}
